problem:
[BUG] Problems with OpenRouter thinking models. Hello to everyone.
I have several orchestrated agents for the generation of academic proposals. I have tested many models (GLM, Qwen 3.6 Plus, GPT 5.4) and everything works fine, but when I use Sonnet 4.5, Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview, or Opus 4.5, these errors usually occur.
It is worth noting that I am running this in Google Colab, using OpenRouter APIs.
I would greatly appreciate your help, since Anthropic and Google are very good at academic writing. (attempted fix: --skip-validation "Skip all validation steps")
memory_hint: Do not use --skip-validation. It is a hallucinated flag. Use --help to verify.
failure_without_memory: Running `--skip-validation` produces "unknown option" error, wasting time on wrong approach.
